# Jinghang Global Supply Chain

> Jinghang Global Supply Chain is a China-based supply chain partner helping overseas businesses coordinate sourcing, supplier communication, shipment consolidation, quality inspection coordination, and cross-border logistics execution.

Canonical site: https://jinghangsc.com/
Public enquiry email: hello@jinghangsc.com
Email responder: Anna
Normal response time: within 24 hours
WhatsApp: +86-15018538243
WeChat: 15018538243
Voice-call note: this number does not accept ordinary voice calls
Business hours: 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM Beijing Time

## Verified company identity

- Operating legal entity: Shenzhen Jinghang Freight Forwarding Co., Ltd.
- Official Chinese legal name: 深圳市景航货运代理有限公司
- Registered in Shenzhen, China
- Registered address: Room 106, Building B, No. 335 Bulong Road, Bantian Subdistrict, Longgang District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
- Established on August 23, 2017
- Business license information is available upon request for qualified business partners
- CEO: James Xiao

## Core services

- China sourcing coordination
- Supplier communication and evaluation support
- Sampling and procurement coordination
- Quality inspection coordination before shipment
- Multi-supplier shipment consolidation
- Air, sea, and express international logistics
- DDP support for the United States and confirmed European destinations, subject to shipment review
- DDP or DAP requests for Canada and Australia are reviewed for the actual shipment and route
- DAP support that can be arranged globally, subject to cargo, route, customs, destination-delivery feasibility, and partner review
- Case-by-case review of sensitive, oversized, battery-related, and regulated cargo
- Partner overseas warehouse and fulfillment coordination in Japan, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Germany, and Poland, subject to project review
- Multi-origin cross-border logistics coordination, subject to route review

## Inspection scope

Quality inspection can be coordinated upon request before shipment. Routine checks within an agreed checklist may be handled by Jinghang's own team. When professional or independent inspection is required, Jinghang can coordinate a paid third-party professional inspection provider. The scope may include quantity, packaging, labeling, and visual defect checks; photo or video records; and loading supervision where applicable. The method, sampling scope, provider, and fee are confirmed before inspection. If issues are found, the client decides whether to request rework, re-inspection, or shipment release.

## Execution model

Jinghang Global Supply Chain uses a collaboration-based execution model. Jinghang's own team and third-party providers are configured according to the requirements of each project. Responsibilities, provider scope, and applicable third-party fees are confirmed before the relevant work begins.

## Coverage and routes

Service coverage is available in Shenzhen, China. Partner-warehouse collection and consolidation support is available in Yiwu and Qingdao. The Yiwu and Qingdao locations are not company-owned offices or warehouses.

Selected project-based routes may involve China, the United States, Europe, Hong Kong, and parts of Southeast Asia. Examples include China to the United States, Europe, Hong Kong, or selected Southeast Asia; the United States to Europe, Hong Kong, or Mainland China; and Europe to the United States, Hong Kong, or Mainland China. Other routes are reviewed case by case.

Priority customer markets are the United States and Europe. The service is designed for overseas small and mid-sized businesses, hardware startups, and companies that need China supply chain execution support.

## DDP and DAP boundaries

DDP support is generally available for the United States and the following European countries, subject to shipment review: Germany, France, Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands, Luxembourg, the Czech Republic, Poland, Slovakia, Slovenia, Denmark, Finland, Sweden, Hungary, Italy, Portugal, Spain, Bulgaria, Estonia, Greece, Croatia, Latvia, Lithuania, Romania, and Ireland. DDP or DAP requests for Canada and Australia require actual-shipment feasibility and route review. DAP may be arranged for other destinations subject to cargo, route, customs, destination-delivery feasibility, and partner review. Each quotation confirms the included and excluded charges for the specific shipment. DDU is used only as a legacy-term explanation, not as a primary current service term.

## Cargo and commercial boundaries

Jinghang Global Supply Chain does not handle prohibited goods, products restricted or banned from export by China, products restricted or banned from import by the destination country, counterfeit or infringing goods, or cargo without required compliance documents.

Commercial terms, warehousing availability, supplier payment support, storage period, fulfillment services, insurance and claim handling, and cancellation or refund arrangements are reviewed case by case. Battery-document requirements, oversized or overweight limits, and inspection sampling methods also depend on the actual cargo and project. These terms have no universal fixed rule and are discussed and confirmed before service begins.

## Languages

Chinese and English are the primary languages. Japanese and Spanish support may be arranged depending on project needs.

## Important qualification

Service availability, customs responsibilities, timing, pricing, team configuration, and commercial terms depend on the cargo, documents, origin, destination, route, and agreed scope. The site does not claim owned warehouses, fixed insurance coverage, guaranteed customs clearance, guaranteed delivery times, or guaranteed project results.
